ORDER DENYING DEFENDANTS' MOTION TO DISMISS THE SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT ON FORUM NON CONVENIENS GROUNDS

LAW AND MOTION, 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANTS MARCELINA GUTIERREZ AND SAMUEL GUTIERREZ' MOTION TO DISMISS THE SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT ON FORUM NON CONVENIENS GROUNDS (CCP SEC 410.30A) IS DENIED. DEFENDANTS WAIVED THEIR FORUM NON CONVENIENS GROUNDS BY FAILING TO MAKE A MOTION AT THE TIME OF FILING THEIR DEMURRER. (CCP 418.10(E)(3).) DEFENDANTS FILED THEIR INITIAL DEMURRER ON DECEMBER 21, 2012. DEFENDANTS FILED THE INSTANT MOTION ON NOVEMBER 21, 2013. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT ; COURT REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR # 5976

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF GUADALUPE GUTIERREZ'S MOTION TO STRIKE DEFENDANTS' MEMO OF COSTS OR ALT TO TAX COSTS - MOTION TO STRIKE OR TAX COSTS IS DENIED. A "PREVAILING PARTY" IS DEFINED AS INCLUDING A DEFENDANT IN WHOSE FAVOR A DISMISSAL IS ENTERED, AND ALSO THE DEFENDANT AS AGAINST THOSE PLAINTIFFS WHO DO NOT RECOVER ANY RELIEF AGAINST THAT DEFENDANT. (CCP 1032(A)(4).) DEFENDANT IS ENTITLED TO AN AWARD OF COSTS FOR FILING AND MOTION FEES AND COURT REPORTER FEES AS ESTABLISHED BY STATUTE, WHICH HERE AMOUNTS TO $1,020.00. (CCP 1033.5) (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER: SHERYL L. SAWYER, CSR #5976 =302/EG

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Strike Deft'S Memo Of Costs Or Alt To Tax Costs
Off Calendar Sep-04-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF GUADALUPE GUTIERREZ'S Motion To Strike Defendants' Memo Of Costs Or Alt To Tax Costs - Motion to Strike or Tax Costs is denied. A "prevailing party" is defined as including a Defendant in whose favor a dismissal is entered, and also the Defendant as against those Plaintiffs who do not recover any relief against that Defendant. (CCP 1032(a)(4).) Defendant is entitled to an award of costs for filing and motion fees and court reporter fees as established by statute, which here amounts to $1,020.00. (CCP 1033.5) (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sheryl L. Sawyer, CSR #5976 =302/eg

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Dismiss The Second Amended Complaint On Forum Non Conveniens Grounds (Ccp Sec 410.30a)
Off Calendar Jan-29-2014 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANTS MARCELINA GUTIERREZ and SAMUEL GUTIERREZ' Motion To Dismiss The Second Amended Complaint On Forum Non Conveniens Grounds (Ccp Sec 410.30a) IS Denied. Defendants waived their forum non conveniens grounds by failing to make a motion at the time of filing their demurrer. (CCP 418.10(e)(3).) Defendants filed their initial demurrer on December 21, 2012. Defendants filed the instant motion on November 21, 2013. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert ; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =(302/EHG)
